deep_dive.title: Spatially-Aligned Chroma from Luma Prediction for Lossless JPEG XS Raw Image Compression
deep_dive.abstract: This study proposes a Chroma from Luma (CfL)-enhanced Star-Tetrix transform (STT), referred to as CfL-STT, for improving raw image compression in JPEG XS. The proposed CfL-STT integrates CfL prediction into the STT to predict chroma components from the luma component in CFA-sampled raw images. Unlike conventional CfL prediction designed for full-color images, the proposed method employs spatially aligned luma samples obtained via linear interpolation along the horizontal and vertical directions to match the chroma sampling grid. This spatial alignment suppresses high-frequency sensor noise while preserving cross-channel correlation, resulting in a more decorrelated Y-Delta-Du-Dv color space. The proposed method was implemented in the JPEG XS reference software and evaluated on raw image datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that a direct application of CfL prediction yields image-dependent performance and may degrade coding efficiency due to the lack of spatial alignment, whereas the proposed CfL-STT consistently improves coding efficiency in lossless raw image compression while preserving exact reversibility.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: proposes CfL-enhanced Star-Tetrix transform for JPEG XS raw image compression, directly related to transform coding
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出CfL增强的Star-Tetrix变换用于JPEG XS原始图像压缩，直接涉及变换编码
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出CfL增强的Star-Tetrix变换用于JPEG XS原始图像压缩，直接涉及变换编码
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出CfL增强的Star-Tetrix变换用于JPEG XS原始图像压缩，直接涉及变换编码
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a CfL-enhanced Star-Tetrix transform for lossless raw image compression in JPEG XS, using spatially aligned luma to predict chroma, improving decorrelation. Directly targets transform coding.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: JPEG XS是低延迟图像编码标准，其原始压缩仍有改进空间。本文提出Chroma from Luma增强的Star-Tetrix变换，在CFA采样图像中利用空间对齐亮度预测色度，抑制噪声并保留相关，得到更去相关的色彩空间。该方法在JPEG XS中实现，显著提升无损压缩性能，直接针对变换编码方案，是图像压缩核心贡献。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: JPEG XS是低延迟图像编码标准，其原始压缩仍有改进空间。本文提出Chroma from Luma增强的Star-Tetrix变换，在CFA采样图像中利用空间对齐亮度预测色度，抑制噪声并保留相关，得到更去相关的色彩空间。该方法在JPEG XS中实现，显著提升无损压缩性能，直接针对变换编码方案，是图像压缩核心贡献。

deep_dive.title: DiffCVE: Diffusion-based Compressed Video Enhancement
deep_dive.abstract: Perceptual quality enhancement of severely compressed videos remains challenging due to complex artifact patterns and substantial information loss. Recent diffusion models have demonstrated strong generative capability for visual restoration, but directly applying them to compressed video often ignores compression degradation characteristics and may introduce structure-inconsistent hallucinations. To address this issue, this paper presents a diffusion-based compressed video enhancement method, named DiffCVE. Coding Prior-enhanced Dual Conditioning (CPDC) branches are designed to jointly model compressed video and coding prior conditions, where coding priors including residuals and motion vectors provide complementary structural and motion guidance during the diffusion denoising process. To make the diffusion process aware of compression severity, a Compression Degradation Semantic Prompting (CDSP) mechanism is introduced to leverage QP-conditioned textual prompts together with LoRA fine-tuning. In addition, a Coding Prior-guided Weighted Fusion (CPWF) module is incorporated into the VAE decoder to fuse VAE encoder and coding prior encoder features with QP-predicted weights. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method in improving perceptual quality, especially under severe compression settings. The project page with enhanced video demonstrations is available at https://wqmaker.github.io/projects/DiffCVE/.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: addresses compressed video enhancement using diffusion models with coding priors, directly related to compression quality improvement
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用扩散模型和编码先验增强压缩视频，直接涉及压缩质量提升
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用扩散模型和编码先验增强压缩视频，直接涉及压缩质量提升
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用扩散模型和编码先验增强压缩视频，直接涉及压缩质量提升
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: DiffCVE uses coding priors (residuals, motion vectors) as dual conditioning in diffusion models to enhance compressed videos, improving perceptual quality.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 压缩视频中的伪影和信息损失难以修复，直接应用扩散模型可能引入结构不一致的幻觉。本文提出DiffCVE，将编码先验（残差和运动矢量）作为双重条件输入扩散模型，提供结构和运动引导。在多个压缩视频数据集上，DiffCVE有效提升了感知质量，同时避免了结构失真。该方法为压缩后处理提供了新的生成式解决方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 压缩视频中的伪影和信息损失难以修复，直接应用扩散模型可能引入结构不一致的幻觉。本文提出DiffCVE，将编码先验（残差和运动矢量）作为双重条件输入扩散模型，提供结构和运动引导。在多个压缩视频数据集上，DiffCVE有效提升了感知质量，同时避免了结构失真。该方法为压缩后处理提供了新的生成式解决方案。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 图像压缩方向论文检索, especially work that connects or combines: transform coding approaches such as DCT and wavelet for image compression; quantization strategies in image compression pipelines; neural network based image compression models using autoencoders; end-to-end learned image compression with rate-distortion optimization; neural network architectures for end to end lossy image compression; rate distortion optimization methods in learned image compression.

deep_dive.title: Difference-Driven Gating: Adaptive Feature Fusion for U-Net Decoder
deep_dive.abstract: The U-Net style models have been widely used in many applications. A critical step in these models is to reconstruct the lower-level features using a top-down decoder. This reconstruction requires precise fusion of high-level semantics and low-level details. Existing attention-based fusion methods typically derive attention weights from the top-down decoder features (global) alone or the correlation between the top-down decoder features and the bottom-up encoder features (local), then modulate the encoder features using these weights. In this work, we explore a different paradigm: deriving attention weights from the difference between the two feature streams. To this end, we propose two difference-based gating approaches: Feature-difference gating (FDG), which directly uses the absolute difference between global and local features to generate adaptive gating maps, and Entropy-difference gating (EDG), which measures the representational certainty of each stream via information entropy and uses their signed entropy difference to derive the attention weights. Both methods produce coupled gating maps that simultaneously modulate the global and local features. Experiments on different tasks including medical image segmentation, remote sensing image cloud removal and speech separation showed that both methods outperformed existing attention-based fusion methods, and EDG performed better. The results suggested a new paradigm for multi-scale feature fusion in the U-Net style structures.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: adaptive feature fusion for U-Net decoder via difference-based gating
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于差异的门控自适应特征融合改进U-Net解码器
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于差异的门控自适应特征融合改进U-Net解码器
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于差异的门控自适应特征融合改进U-Net解码器
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes difference-driven gating for adaptive feature fusion in U-Net decoder, deriving attention weights from feature difference rather than individual streams, improving reconstruction.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: U-Net模型在重建低层特征时，现有注意力融合方法仅从单流或相关性中提取权重。本文提出差异驱动门控，通过计算特征差异生成注意力权重，实现更精确的高低语义融合。实验表明该方法在多个应用场景中改善了重建质量，为U-Net类模型的解码器设计提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: U-Net模型在重建低层特征时，现有注意力融合方法仅从单流或相关性中提取权重。本文提出差异驱动门控，通过计算特征差异生成注意力权重，实现更精确的高低语义融合。实验表明该方法在多个应用场景中改善了重建质量，为U-Net类模型的解码器设计提供了新思路。

deep_dive.title: Let RGB Be the Language of Vision
deep_dive.abstract: This work introduces a unified formulation for vision models, where diverse forms of visual information beyond natural images, such as masks, depth maps, and other structured visual signals, are all represented as RGB images, while general visual tasks can be converted into a common RGB-to-RGB image editing problem. In this paradigm, different types of visual information internally share the same encoding and decoding architecture and parameters as natural images, enabling a single model to transfer across tasks through a unified visual interface, in a way analogous to how language models operate over text. We refer to this formulation as RGB In and RGB Out (RINO). Built upon a generic image editing backbone without task-specific fine-tuning, RINO demonstrates robust and competitive zero-shot performance on both dense understanding tasks such as segmentation and depth estimation (where we unify outputs as RGB), and dense-conditioned generation tasks such as pose-to-image generation (where we unify inputs as RGB). We hope this study provides useful insights toward general unified vision-language systems, where diverse visual tasks can be expressed, interpreted, and solved through a shared visual language. Code is available at https://github.com/yangtiming/RINO.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: unified vision model treating all visual tasks as RGB-to-RGB editing
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 将所有视觉任务统一为RGB到RGB编辑的视觉模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 将所有视觉任务统一为RGB到RGB编辑的视觉模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 将所有视觉任务统一为RGB到RGB编辑的视觉模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes RINO, a unified framework where diverse visual information is represented as RGB images and tasks are converted to RGB-to-RGB editing, enabling zero-shot transfer.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有视觉模型针对不同任务分别设计、缺乏统一性的问题，提出RGB in RGB out（RINO）框架，将掩码、深度图等结构信息均表示为RGB图像，所有视觉任务统一为RGB到RGB的图像编辑问题。共享同一编码解码架构，无需任务特定微调即可零样本迁移，在多个任务上展示出竞争性能，类比语言模型的统一接口。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对现有视觉模型针对不同任务分别设计、缺乏统一性的问题，提出RGB in RGB out（RINO）框架，将掩码、深度图等结构信息均表示为RGB图像，所有视觉任务统一为RGB到RGB的图像编辑问题。共享同一编码解码架构，无需任务特定微调即可零样本迁移，在多个任务上展示出竞争性能，类比语言模型的统一接口。

quick_skim.title: Simon-SR: Spatially Adaptive Modulation and Visual Prompt Adaptation for Text-Reinforced Super-Resolution
quick_skim.abstract: Single Image Super-Resolution (SISR) reconstructs high-quality images from low-resolution inputs. While recent multi-modal methods improve perceptual quality, they remain sensitive to erroneous priors and require expensive annotations. To address these issues, we propose Simon-SR, a multi-modal SISR framework leveraging learnable prompts for efficient semantic mining and robust text-image fusion. Our approach combines Contrastive Prompt Learning with Prompt-Guided Spatially Adaptive Refinement to enhance multi-modal alignment. Experiments demonstrate that Simon-SR surpasses state-of-the-art methods, achieving maximum improvements of 0.50 dB in PSNR, 0.0133 in SSIM, and 0.0695 in LPIPS. Code will be released.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Simon-SR framework with spatially adaptive modulation for super-resolution, improving architecture
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: Simon-SR框架通过空间自适应调制提升超分辨率，属于计算机视觉架构改进
quick_skim.llm_evidence: Simon-SR框架通过空间自适应调制提升超分辨率，属于计算机视觉架构改进
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: Simon-SR框架通过空间自适应调制提升超分辨率，属于计算机视觉架构改进
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Simon-SR introduces a multi-modal SR framework using learnable prompts and spatially adaptive refinement, achieving SOTA PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS, demonstrating effective architecture improvement for CV.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有超分辨率多模态方法易受错误先验影响且需要昂贵标注。本文提出Simon-SR框架，利用可学习提示进行高效语义挖掘，结合对比提示学习和提示引导的空间自适应细化增强多模态对齐。实验在PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS上超越SOTA，为计算机视觉架构改进提供有用模块设计。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有超分辨率多模态方法易受错误先验影响且需要昂贵标注。本文提出Simon-SR框架，利用可学习提示进行高效语义挖掘，结合对比提示学习和提示引导的空间自适应细化增强多模态对齐。实验在PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS上超越SOTA，为计算机视觉架构改进提供有用模块设计。

quick_skim.title: Partial-Reference IQA Based on Hermite-Gauss Structural Prediction and Texture Deviation
quick_skim.abstract: We propose PreSPA (Partial-Reference Structural Prediction Approach), a Partial-Reference Image Quality Assessment framework that decomposes perceptual quality into two complementary indices. A structure-aware index, operating in a No-Reference manner, captures structural degradation through Hermite-Gauss prediction of the distorted gradient field and the angular variance of its curvature. A texture-sensitive index estimates local noise through a scalar prior $μ$, obtained from energy differences between reference and distorted complex gradient maps on strong-edge regions and accumulated over weakly-structured ones, reflecting the perceptual leakage of degraded edges into surrounding textures. Crucially, $μ$ is the only information extracted from the reference and is computed once per image pair, reducing the reference footprint to its information-theoretic minimum. The final score is produced by an affine fusion with only three interpretable parameters, making the method compact, transparent, and computationally efficient, with the viewing distance embedded into the operator scale and no dataset-specific calibration. Extensive evaluations on six standard benchmarks show that PreSPA consistently rivals or exceeds leading No-Reference approaches, while in several cases matching the accuracy of Full-Reference models.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: proposes a partial-reference IQA framework useful for evaluating compression artifacts in image compression
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出了一种部分参考图像质量评估框架，可用于评估图像压缩中的压缩伪影
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出了一种部分参考图像质量评估框架，可用于评估图像压缩中的压缩伪影
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出了一种部分参考图像质量评估框架，可用于评估图像压缩中的压缩伪影
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: PreSPA decomposes perceptual quality into structure and texture indices via Hermite-Gauss prediction and edge-based energy differences, requiring only a scalar prior from the reference.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 图像质量评估是压缩系统的重要环节。本文提出PreSPA，一种部分参考图像质量评估框架，将感知质量分解为结构感知和纹理敏感两个互补指标。结构指标基于Hermite-Gauss预测，纹理指标通过参考图与失真图在强边缘区域的能量差异估计局部噪声。该方法仅需从参考图提取一个标量先验，在多个数据集上有效评估压缩失真。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 图像质量评估是压缩系统的重要环节。本文提出PreSPA，一种部分参考图像质量评估框架，将感知质量分解为结构感知和纹理敏感两个互补指标。结构指标基于Hermite-Gauss预测，纹理指标通过参考图与失真图在强边缘区域的能量差异估计局部噪声。该方法仅需从参考图提取一个标量先验，在多个数据集上有效评估压缩失真。

quick_skim.title: CoSAG: Compact Semantic Anchor Gaussians via Training-Free Rate-Distortion Coding
quick_skim.abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding is commonly achieved by embedding 2D vision-language features such as CLIP into a 3D Gaussian Splatting scene, turning it into a text-queryable semantic field. However, attaching a high-dimensional feature to each of millions of Gaussians inflates a single scene to gigabytes, which makes storage and deployment the real bottleneck of these fields. Existing compact methods each learn and ship a per-scene codec, an autoencoder, a quantized codebook, or a distilled feature field, entangling field construction with field storage and never compressing the per-Gaussian assignment that holds the bulk of the cost. We argue that construction and storage should be decoupled, and that storage is a rate-distortion problem over the per-Gaussian binding to a small anchor table, a structure no prior open-vocabulary method compresses. We present CoSAG, which constructs the field without any per-scene training through a closed-form transmittance-weighted lift, spatially grounded semantic anchors, and multi-view denoising, and stores it with a spatially predictive entropy coder that ships no decoder. Because the anchors are spatially grounded, the binding is predictable and therefore highly compressible. The transmittance-weighted lift and multi-view denoising yield a clean, view-consistent assignment, so the entropy coder spends almost no rate on correcting noise and instead codes only the residual against its spatial prediction. CoSAG reaches sub-megabyte storage while matching or exceeding the state of the art across the 2D-rendered, 3D-selection, and dense-LSeg protocols, reducing field size by 37 to 76x relative to LangSplatV2 at higher accuracy.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: training-free rate-distortion coding for 3D scene compression
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 免训练的率失真编码用于3D场景压缩
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 免训练的率失真编码用于3D场景压缩
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 免训练的率失真编码用于3D场景压缩
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: CoSAG decouples 3D scene construction from storage and applies rate-distortion coding to compress per-Gaussian assignments, achieving compact semantic fields.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 3D语义场景存储瓶颈在于每个高斯点的高维特征，现有方法将场景构建与存储耦合。CoSAG提出解耦方案，将存储视为率失真问题，使用免训练编码压缩高斯分配。在多个数据集上，CoSAG以极低比特率保持了可比的语义查询性能，展示了率失真理论在3D压缩中的有效性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 3D语义场景存储瓶颈在于每个高斯点的高维特征，现有方法将场景构建与存储耦合。CoSAG提出解耦方案，将存储视为率失真问题，使用免训练编码压缩高斯分配。在多个数据集上，CoSAG以极低比特率保持了可比的语义查询性能，展示了率失真理论在3D压缩中的有效性。

quick_skim.title: REBASE: Reference-Background Subspace Elimination for Training-Free In-Context Segmentation
quick_skim.abstract: Training-free in-context segmentation enables new object categories to be introduced at inference time from a single annotated reference image, eliminating the retraining and memory overhead of class-incremental learning. Recent approaches achieve this by combining vision foundation models for semantic correspondence with promptable segmentation networks like SAM. However, their performance is fundamentally limited by the quality of the cross-image similarity map; shared contextual backgrounds between the reference and query systematically elevate similarity in non-target regions, degrading prompt localization. We present REBASE, a training-free framework that explicitly suppresses these spurious contextual correspondences. Our method identifies the low-rank background feature subspace from the reference image and project the reference and query features onto its orthogonal complement in closed form, yielding cleaner semantic matching. We then generate positive point prompts using similarity-weighted farthest-point sampling, paired with a refined dense similarity prior. Without any training or parameter updates, our approach establishes a new state of the art among training-free methods on PACO-Part, FSS-1000, and cross-domain datasets such as ISIC2018, demonstrating that explicit background subspace removal is a highly effective principle for one-shot localization.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: training-free in-context segmentation framework using vision foundation models, general CV approach
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出训练自由的上下文分割框架，利用视觉基础模型，属于计算机视觉通用方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出训练自由的上下文分割框架，利用视觉基础模型，属于计算机视觉通用方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出训练自由的上下文分割框架，利用视觉基础模型，属于计算机视觉通用方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: REBASE presents a training-free framework for in-context segmentation that suppresses spurious contextual correspondences via reference-background subspace elimination, using vision foundation models. A general CV segmentation approach.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 无需重新训练的分割方法中共享上下文背景导致定位精度下降。本文提出REBASE框架，无需训练即可显式抑制虚假上下文对应，利用视觉基础模型和SAM进行分割。该方法为计算机视觉分割任务提供了通用且有效的方案，提升了训练自由的上下文分割性能。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 无需重新训练的分割方法中共享上下文背景导致定位精度下降。本文提出REBASE框架，无需训练即可显式抑制虚假上下文对应，利用视觉基础模型和SAM进行分割。该方法为计算机视觉分割任务提供了通用且有效的方案，提升了训练自由的上下文分割性能。

quick_skim.title: Do You Remember? Toward Memory-Centric Multimodal AI
quick_skim.abstract: Human memory is reconstructive, not a faithful recording. Current multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) lack this capability: they process images through a frozen visual encoder, produce a one-shot text output, and discard internal representations. We present DoYouRemember, a three-stage architecture introducing reconstructive memory into MLLMs: (1) a VQ-VAE compresses images into discrete visual tokens, (2) a LoRA-fine-tuned LLM jointly attends to visual and text tokens, and (3) a Diffusion Decoder reconstructs images from the LLM's hidden states. On 1,000 3D facial skin texture maps and 99,000 unlabeled facial images, we find that LLM hidden states contain approximately zero recoverable visual information -- the same Decoder producing clear reconstructions from VQ-VAE tokens (pre-LLM) produces pure noise from LLM hidden states (post-LLM), demonstrating that the LLM understands images but does not remember them. Training a shared memory matrix M under backpropagation systematically fails due to gradient cancellation (O(1/sqrt(N)) attenuation). We identify three root causes and show that local EMA updating resolves all three: each image updates only its top-8 slots out of 64, preserving inter-slot diversity. The resulting M (229K parameters, 16x compressed) approaches the VQ upper bound on unseen test images. Scaling to 1,024 slots surpasses it (LPIPS 0.056 vs. 0.071), as M's continuous representation avoids VQ quantization error. We unify these findings under an information-theoretic framework: memory is lossy compression, recall is decompression, and hallucination is an inherent property of lossy decompression rather than a defect.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: uses VQ-VAE for image compression as part of memory architecture
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用VQ-VAE将图像压缩为离散token，属于基于自编码器的图像压缩
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用VQ-VAE将图像压缩为离散token，属于基于自编码器的图像压缩
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用VQ-VAE将图像压缩为离散token，属于基于自编码器的图像压缩
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DoYouRemember uses VQ-VAE to compress images into discrete tokens, a key component in autoencoder-based image compression, within a memory-centric multimodal AI architecture.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 当前多模态大模型缺乏重建式记忆能力。本文提出DoYouRemember架构，包含VQ-VAE图像压缩、LoRA微调LLM和扩散解码器。VQ-VAE将图像压缩为离散视觉token，属于自编码器图像压缩方法。实验发现LLM隐藏状态几乎不含可恢复视觉信息，但VQ-VAE本身展示了压缩能力。该工作为图像压缩模块在多模态系统中的应用提供了案例。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 当前多模态大模型缺乏重建式记忆能力。本文提出DoYouRemember架构，包含VQ-VAE图像压缩、LoRA微调LLM和扩散解码器。VQ-VAE将图像压缩为离散视觉token，属于自编码器图像压缩方法。实验发现LLM隐藏状态几乎不含可恢复视觉信息，但VQ-VAE本身展示了压缩能力。该工作为图像压缩模块在多模态系统中的应用提供了案例。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: neural network based image compression models using autoencoders

quick_skim.title: DeGuNet: Depth-Guided Ultra-Compact Backbones for Efficient LiDAR-Camera 3D Detection
quick_skim.abstract: In autonomous driving perception, the fusion of LiDAR and camera modalities has become the dominant paradigm for 3D object detection. However, current multi-modal frameworks heavily rely on massive visual backbones pretrained on 2D semantic tasks. This reliance introduces substantial parameter redundancy and a structural misalignment, as 2D priors are ill-equipped to handle the extreme sparsity of LiDAR projections required for Bird's-Eye-View geometry. To address this, we present DeGuNet, an ultra-compact and plug-and-play image backbone explicitly designed for depth-guided representation learning. By incorporating sparsity-aware feature extraction mechanisms, DeGuNet effectively aligns multi-view images with unstructured LiDAR depth while strictly preventing invalid-region contamination. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate DeGuNet's broad plug-and-play applicability and superior efficiency. When integrated into established baselines, it fundamentally eliminates architectural redundancy, reducing GPU memory consumption by up to 66.5% and achieving a 1.16x inference speedup. Concurrently, DeGuNet delivers up to a 6.20 absolute mAP gain, establishing a new paradigm for parameter-efficient multi-modal 3D perception.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于3D检测的超紧凑图像骨干网络
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于3D检测的超紧凑图像骨干网络
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于3D检测的超紧凑图像骨干网络
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Designs DeGuNet, a plug-and-play ultra-compact backbone for depth-guided representation in LiDAR-camera 3D detection, reducing redundancy.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多模态3D检测中视觉骨干参数冗余及结构失配问题，提出DeGuNet超紧凑图像骨干。该网络专为深度引导表示学习设计，引入稀疏感知特征提取机制，有效对齐多视图图像与非结构化LiDAR深度。作为即插即用模块，可替代现有笨重骨干，在保持精度的同时大幅降低参数量和计算量。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对多模态3D检测中视觉骨干参数冗余及结构失配问题，提出DeGuNet超紧凑图像骨干。该网络专为深度引导表示学习设计，引入稀疏感知特征提取机制，有效对齐多视图图像与非结构化LiDAR深度。作为即插即用模块，可替代现有笨重骨干，在保持精度的同时大幅降低参数量和计算量。

quick_skim.title: Realizable N:M Sparse Transformer Inference via Search-Kernel Co-Design
quick_skim.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong accuracy but incur high inference latency. Semi-structured N:M sparsity can reduce arithmetic cost, yet its theoretical savings often fail to translate into proportional end-to-end speedups on modern GPUs. This mismatch arises because deployment latency depends not only on arithmetic reduction but also on execution regularity and hardware scheduling under sparsity. Achieving practical acceleration, therefore, requires coordinated design across sparse execution and sparsity configuration. To this end, we propose a hardware-software co-design framework for N:M sparse ViT inference. On the hardware side, we design MD-SpMM, an N:M sparse CUDA kernel that reorganizes sparse GEMM into micro-dense, Tensor-Core-aligned dataflow and uses inference-aware adaptive parallelism to sustain utilization. On the software side, we perform layer-wise sparsity search under explicit end-to-end latency budgets using a three-stage heuristic search with constraint relaxation to avoid premature convergence and enable deployment-aware sparsity allocation. Experiments on multiple ViT/Swin models and GPU platforms show that the framework achieves over 2.2x latency speedup while maintaining comparable accuracy and delivering superior accuracy under the same latency constraint. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/liuganhuo/realizable-nm-sparse-transformer.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Hardware-software co-design for N:M sparse ViT inference
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: N:M稀疏ViT推理的软硬件协同设计
quick_skim.llm_evidence: N:M稀疏ViT推理的软硬件协同设计
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: N:M稀疏ViT推理的软硬件协同设计
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes MD-SpMM kernel and co-design to achieve real N:M sparse acceleration for ViTs.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对N:M稀疏化理论加速比无法转换为实际推理加速的问题，本文提出软硬件协同设计框架。硬件侧设计MD-SpMM内核将稀疏矩阵乘法重组为微密集张量核心操作；软件侧集成搜索策略优化稀疏配置。实验表明该方法在多种ViT模型上实现了接近理论值的端到端加速，显著降低推理延迟。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对N:M稀疏化理论加速比无法转换为实际推理加速的问题，本文提出软硬件协同设计框架。硬件侧设计MD-SpMM内核将稀疏矩阵乘法重组为微密集张量核心操作；软件侧集成搜索策略优化稀疏配置。实验表明该方法在多种ViT模型上实现了接近理论值的端到端加速，显著降低推理延迟。
